DP.462.0000:
Oak: Ah, [0103,0000]!
It’s good to see you!\f
Without any further ado, I’d like you
to examine this stone tablet.\f
Something just like it was also
discovered in the Kanto region.\f
I want to ask for your help in
solving the mystery behind this.\f
DP.462.0001:
Oak: Ah, [0103,0000]!
It’s good to see you!\f
Without any further ado, I’d like you
to examine this stone tablet.\f
Something just like it was also
discovered in the Kanto region.\f
I want to ask for your help in
solving the mystery behind this.\f
DP.462.0002:
I tried deciphering the engravings on
the stone tablet.\f
Apparently, it is for a Trainer to
engrave their thoughts after growing\r
as a person through adventure.\f
A Trainer fitting that description
would be you.\f
That’s why I’m asking you for your
help.\f
You’ve met many people and Pokémon,
and experienced many things that\r
shaped you into the person you are.\f
I want you to sincerely tell me who
affected you the most.\f
Tell me, to whom do you most want
to say your thanks?\f
DP.462.0003:
Hm...\f
You most want to express your
thanks to [011C,0001]?\f
You’re absolutely certain of it?
DP.462.0004:
Oak: ?!
What was that Pokémon?\f
Is it somehow connected to
the stone tablet?\f
Hmm... Where did that Pokémon go?
Its destination is intriguing...
DP.462.0005:
Oak: What’s wrong? You’re not
suggesting there’s no one?\f
Tell me, to whom do you most want
to say your thanks?\f
DP.462.0006:
The surface is unmarked.
It is polished like a mirror.
DP.462.0007:
[011C,0001], to whom I give
my thanks.
